description: Plugin-distributed hooks for desktop-app-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable desktop security anti-patterns (insecure Electron webPreferences, wildcard Tauri capabilities, plaintext secrets, deprecated altool). Set DESKTOP_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
